_format: Artist-specific translation overrides. Flat {word|lemma: gloss} — the gloss string is used directly as the card's translation. Overrides shared/curated_translations.json for the same key. Applied by step_8b when the target group has exactly one sense/assignment (len(word_assignments) == 1); see pipeline/artist/step_8b_assemble_artist_vocabulary.py.
_source: 2026-07-12 wikt-deck audit: deck_quality_candidates_wikt.json review (name-reference glosses for words whose single Wiktionary sense leaked an unrelated/literal meaning).
